content: {"question_id": "q1_gtv_idr_by_asset_oct_2025", "question": "What was total GTV (IDR) by asset class in October 2025?", "metric_name": "gtv_idr_by_asset_class", "metric_value": null, "period": "October 2025", "source": {"primary_table": "fct_trading_daily", "why_chosen": "Canonical completed-transaction source for gtv_idr. status=completed is already applied in the mart.", "alternatives_available": ["agg_monthly_biz_summary", "mart_ops_dashboard"]}, "sql": "SELECT asset_class, ROUND(SUM(CAST(gtv_idr AS REAL)), 2) AS gtv_idr FROM fct_trading_daily WHERE transaction_date >= '2025-10-01' AND transaction_date < '2025-11-01' GROUP BY asset_class ORDER BY asset_class", "filters": ["transaction_date in October 2025", "completed transactions only (baked into fct_trading_daily)"], "assumptions": ["Use completed transactions. status=completed is already filtered by fct_trading_daily."], "logic": "Sum gtv_idr across October 2025 by asset_class from the canonical daily trading mart.", "result_rows": [], "interpretation_choices": [], "dq_notes": [], "warnings": []}
